Please always provide the [GitHub issue(s)](../issues) your PR is for, as well as test URLs where your change can be observed (before and after):

Fix #<gh-issue-id>

Test URLs:
- Before: https://main--ib-test-repo-aem-sites--IBilus.aem.live/
- After: https://<branch>--ib-test-repo-aem-sites--IBilus.aem.live/
